Comment.MultiLanguageText: Message: Clean the sheet metal (200 h)
Message: Check the filter of the Laser power unit (2000 h)
Message: Check the safety systems (2000 h)
Message: Grease the X axis (1 y)
Message: Grease the Y axis (1 y)
Message: Check the water level of the TERMOTEK cooler (24 h)
Message: Clean the grid of the TERMOTEK cooler (24 h)
Message: Check the operation of the condensate drain (24 h)
Message: Check the dew point under pressure (24 h)
Message: Clean the grid of the air dryer (24 h)
Message: Replace the line filter of the air dryer (600 h)
Message: Replace 5 µm filter cartridge (600 h)
Message: Replace 0.01 µm filter cartridge (600 h)
Message: Replace the particles filter of the suction system (1000 h)
Message: Replace the filtration cassette AND the actived carbon of the suction system (1000 h)
Message: Replace the air conditioning filter (1000 h)
Message: Replace the TERMOTEK cooler filter (2000 h)
Message: Replace the water of the TERMOTEK cooler (2000 h)

LineComment.Text: Comment/Function: Liste des apparaeils à controler dans la Liste des équipements
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Termotek chiller: change filter and water
Replace the filters for the vacuum of the loading/unloading
Replace the filters of the vacuum generator VADM
Replace the fine filter of the air dryer
UTL extraction: replace filter cassette and active carbon filter
Replace the seal on the air lock door (SAS)
